prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约9889名、12019名、11358名、39298名（含特殊专业组断档）、11543名。排除2024年特殊专业组断档后，近4年 正常位次在9889–12019区间波动，2025年基准约11543名，较2021年低位有所后移；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021年98人、2022年98人、2023年104人、2024 年120人、2025年113人；2026年计划为111人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约1.8%，缩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第65名→2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026年高考周期内该校 声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教授考核争议），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度评价为一般（总排名第73位），未出现明显热度爆发；历史 投档异常记录中该校未出现断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，法学获评A等级、应用经济学获评A-，均为该校王牌学科，与物理类招生中的法学类、金融学类、财 政学类、经济管理试验班等高度对应，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业2026年热度为分化观望，金融/财经/经济类为分化观望，计算机类为推荐，整体热度平稳偏分化；广西物理类考生数从2025年约260429人增至2026年估算约268912人（+3.3%），考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧；学校位于湖北武汉，属华中地区，对广西考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在广西物理类招生计划约占全国总计划的较小比例，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11543名、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓和效应微弱）、广西物理类考生增加（加剧竞争）、学校软科排名上升（增强吸引力）及声誉偏负面（轻微抑 制）等多因素，经有限修正后预测2026年最低位次约11450名。位次较2025年略升（位次数字减小约93名），主要因招生计划缩招的缓和效应略大 于考生增加和声誉因素的推升效应。预测区间10950–11950名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9889, 12019, 11358, 39298 (including a special major group cutoff), and 11543. Excluding the 2024 special major group cutoff, the normal rankings over the past 4 years fluctuated within the range of 9889–12019. The 2025 baseline is approximately 11543, which is slightly lower than the 2021 low point. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 98 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 120 in 2024, and 113 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 111, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.8%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years, from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to incidents related to teacher ethics (professor assessment controversy), which may have a mild inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity rating is average (73rd overall), with no significant popularity explosion. There are no signs of cutoff anomalies in historical application records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Law was rated A, and Applied Economics was rated A-, both flagship disciplines of the university, which highly correspond to the Law, Finance, Fiscal, and Economic Management Experimental classes in the Physics Category enrollment, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of Law is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see, and Computer Science is recommended, with overall popularity stable but divided. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi increased from approximately 260,429 in 2025 to an estimated 268,912 in 2026 (+3.3%), slightly intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the Central China region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi accounts for a relatively small proportion of the national total, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11543, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (weak mitigating effect), the increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the slightly negative reputation (mild inhibition), after limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 11450. The ranking is slightly higher than 2025 (ranking number decreases by about 93), mainly because the mitigating effect of the enrollment plan reduction slightly outweighs the pushing effects of candidate increase and reputation factors. The predicted range is 10950–11950.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Finance, Statistics, Fiscal, Actuarial Science) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Economic Management Experimental Class, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10950) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
